topPrompts.prompt: Close-up of the La Roche-Posay Vitamin C12 amber dropper bottle with the glass pipette lifted above the bottle opening, a single luminous golden serum drop suspended at the pipette tip catching a warm sidelight, the stone slab surface below slightly out of focus, shallow depth of field on 100mm macro f/2.8, warm beige tones throughout, no text no people

La Roche-Posay Vitamin C12 amber dropper bottle on the flat sandstone slab, a hard beam of warm morning sunlight cutting diagonally across the frame from camera-right, casting a long crisp shadow of the bottle across the stone surface, the golden serum inside the bottle glowing intensely where the light passes through, warm beige background, minimal and graphic, no text no people, 50mm f/2.8

La Roche-Posay Vitamin C12 amber dropper bottle standing on the sandstone slab alongside a halved blood orange with vibrant orange flesh facing camera, warm natural light from camera-left, the amber bottle and orange sharing the same golden colour palette, a few small orange peel fragments scattered on the stone, editorial vitamin C story, no text no people, 85mm f/2

La Roche-Posay Vitamin C12 amber dropper bottle resting on a piece of raw undyed linen cloth draped over the flat sandstone slab, soft diffused warm light from above, tactile contrast between the smooth glass bottle and the rough woven linen texture, the stone edge visible beneath the fabric, muted warm beige and cream tones, no text no people, 85mm f/2.8

La Roche-Posay Vitamin C12 amber dropper bottle centered on the sandstone slab, warm backlight from directly behind creating a glowing rim light on both edges of the glass bottle and illuminating the golden serum from behind, soft golden lens flare at the top edge, the bottle silhouette sharp against the warm luminous background, luxurious and minimal, no text no people, 85mm f/1.8

La Roche-Posay Vitamin C12 amber glass dropper bottle standing upright on a flat rough-hewn sandstone slab, a tall egg-shaped sandstone rock directly behind it, warm directional light from camera-left illuminating the golden serum through the glass, soft beige seamless background, clean minimal product photography, no text no people, shot on 85mm f/2.8
